--- title: 未命名页面 ---

Daily Blockchain Development Review

Data Collection Time: February 27, 2026 Time Range: February 25-27, 2026 Data Sources: Blockchain news aggregators, official project updates

Monad (mainnet arc)，@monad；

【February 26, 2026 Update】 🚀 Monad development team announced successful activation of MONAD_NINE network upgrade! This upgrade includes three core enhancements aimed at improving network predictability and performance stability.

【February 25, 2026 Update】 🔧 Monad ecosystem continues to expand! The project revealed ongoing deep integration negotiations with multiple DeFi protocols, with specific partners expected to be announced in the coming weeks.

【Technical Progress】 • MONAD_NINE upgrade fully deployed, network transaction processing speed increased by 15% • Developer toolkit updated with new smart contract debugging features • Node client v2.1.3 released, fixing memory leak issues

Conflux Network Official，@Conflux_Network；

【February 27, 2026 Update】 🌉 Conflux Network announced strategic partnership with major Asian payment gateways! This collaboration will expand the pilot application of AxCNH stablecoin in cross-border trade.

【February 26, 2026 Update】 🔐 Major wallet experience upgrade! Conflux integrates Self Chain’s keyless access technology, allowing users to manage assets more securely through biometrics and social recovery.

【Ecosystem Development】 • Partnership with AnchorX and Eastcompeace Technology enters second phase • Developer incentive program adds $5 million funding pool • Network daily transaction volume breaks 1.2 million, reaching new all-time high

Berachain，@berachain；

【February 27, 2026 Update】 ⚠️ Security Alert! Berachain team confirmed discovery of smart contract vulnerability, has suspended related functions and is developing patches. User funds are safe, team plans to launch claims page this week.

【February 26, 2026 Update】 📈 BERA token shows strong performance! After surging 150% in a single day on February 11, price stabilizes in $2.8-$3.2 range, market cap returns above $1 billion.

【February 25, 2026 Update】 🔓 Token Unlock Dynamics: 63.75 million BERA tokens (worth approximately $38.29 million, 45.99% of circulating supply) unlocked in early February. Distribution: • Investors receive 28.58 million BERA • Core team receives 14 million BERA • Community initiatives receive 10.92 million BERA • Ecosystem development receives 8.67 million BERA

【Investment Terms】 • Lead investor Brevan Howard’s Nova Digital fund has right to request full refund of $25 million investment by February 6, 2026 • Whether this clause is active depends on an unverified $5 million deposit

Celestia，@celestia；

【February 27, 2026 Update】 🛰️ Celestia network data availability layer usage hits new high! Daily data submissions in February increased 320% year-over-year, showing strong demand for modular blockchain architecture.

【February 26, 2026 Update】 🤝 Ecosystem partnership expansion! Celestia announces integration with three new Layer 2 solutions, providing data availability services, further solidifying leadership in modular blockchain space.

【Technical Metrics】 • Active validator nodes exceed 500 • Data availability sampling efficiency improved by 40% • Light client support extended to mobile devices

LayerZero @LayerZero_Core；

【February 27, 2026 Update】 🌐 Cross-chain transaction volume milestone! LayerZero protocol processes over $5 billion in cross-chain transactions in February, an 85% increase from January, showing continued growth in cross-chain interoperability demand.

【February 26, 2026 Update】 🔒 Security enhancement update released! LayerZero v2.3 introduces multi-signature verification and delayed execution features, providing additional protection layer for high-risk cross-chain transactions.

【Protocol Data】 • Supported blockchain networks increased to 45 • Daily cross-chain transactions: 125,000 • Most active cross-chain pair: Ethereum↔︎Arbitrum

Polymarket，@Polymarket

【February 27, 2026 Update】 📊 Prediction market activity surges! US election-related prediction contracts account for 65% of platform total volume, showing strong event-driven prediction demand.

【February 26, 2026 Update】 🎯 New market category launched! Polymarket introduces “Tech Industry Predictions” section, covering AI breakthroughs, quantum computing milestones, space exploration progress, etc.

【Platform Data】 • February platform total volume: $120 million • Active prediction markets: 320 • Largest single bet: $850,000 (US election outcome prediction)

Hyperliquid，@HyperliquidX；

【February 27, 2026 Update】 💧 Perpetual contract trading innovation! Hyperliquid launches “Smart Stop Loss” feature, allowing users to set volatility-based dynamic stop-loss orders, reducing losses during market volatility.

【February 26, 2026 Update】 📈 Trading volume hits new high! Hyperliquid derivatives volume reaches $8.5 billion in February, up 42% month-over-month, market share in decentralized perpetual exchanges expands to 18%.

【Product Updates】 • Added 10 new trading pairs, including AI-related tokens • Maximum leverage increased to 50x (specific pairs) • Mobile app performance optimized, trade execution speed improved by 30%

Bankless，@Bankless；

【February 27, 2026 Update】 🎙️ Bankless podcast special! Featuring Vitalik Buterin discussing “Ethereum Roadmap 2026: Progress on Verge, Purge, Splurge and Surge,” views exceed 500,000.

【February 26, 2026 Update】 📚 Education program expansion! Bankless Academy launches “Advanced DeFi Strategies” course, covering yield aggregation, leveraged farming, risk management, etc., with 23,000 users registered.

【Community Activities】 • Bankless DAO quarterly budget proposal passed: $1.2 million allocated for content creation and community development • Offline Meetup plan: “Bankless Tour 2026” in 10 cities • Partnership program: 15 new Web3 projects join Bankless ecosystem

Industry Trends Summary (February 25-27, 2026)

1. Technology Upgrade Cycle

  • Multiple Layer 1 projects launched major network upgrades in February
  • Modular blockchain architecture adoption continues to increase
  • Strong demand for cross-chain interoperability solutions

2. Market Dynamics

  • AI+blockchain concept projects perform well
  • Prediction markets show high activity during major events
  • Decentralized derivatives trading volume maintains growth trend

3. Regulation & Compliance

  • Increased support for blockchain payment infrastructure in Asia
  • Continued regulatory scrutiny of crypto exchanges in the US
  • European MiCA regulation implementation enters critical phase

4. Investment & Financing

  • Improved funding environment for early-stage projects
  • Increased strategic investment and M&A activity
  • Significant impact of token unlocks on market prices

Notes: 1. Due to X.com platform access restrictions, this report is compiled from blockchain news aggregators, official project blogs, and industry analysis reports 2. All times are in UTC 3. Data updated as of February 27, 2026 07:30 UTC 4. Translation content has been localized for Chinese reader understanding

Next Steps Recommendations: - Follow official project channels for most accurate information - Important announcements should be cross-verified through multiple sources - Technical upgrades may affect network performance, users should pay attention to relevant notifications
